shared_properties: Gate footprint remains 32x32 px so the final interaction reads larger than standard hazards and supports a clear completion target.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while gate-specific colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Stone frame thickness remains 3 px on both sides so the glowing center feels enclosed inside dungeon architecture.
differences: Six frames pulse the central glow between gate gold and torch amber to signal the single clear objective.
The opening uses a darker interior in frames 1 to 3 and a brighter interior in frames 4 to 6 for a clear attract cycle.
No textual signage, arrow UI, or progress number is embedded into the gate art.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 32x32 exit gate size, clear condition, and end-of-run visual priority at the lowest dungeon layer.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the somber dungeon architecture and the single warm gold focal point reserved for escape.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player-to-goal scale so the prisoner silhouette feels small but visibly able to enter the gate opening.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for parallax backdrops and TilemapChunk-backed textures for reusable 16x16 surface modules.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world textures before gameplay, cache tile indices for high, medium, and low friction surfaces, and keep shaft layer handles in a WorldVisualRegistry resource.
runtime_notes: Render the shaft backdrop from an offscreen 320x180 target and upscale by an integer factor of 4 to preserve pixel integrity.
Move parallax layers at 0.4x camera speed and keep their anchors fixed to the downward-only camera model.
Treat one-way ledges and exit gates as separate gameplay entities even when they share world art atlases.

context.usage: Final interactable gate at the bottom of the shaft that triggers the clear sequence.

glow_notes: Opening width is 16 px centered within the 32 px frame.
Gold glow reaches peak brightness in frames 5 and 6.
Top arch rises to y1 and keeps a symmetrical curve within the 32 px canvas.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x32 px with 6 frames of 32x32 px and 0 px spacing.
Frames 5 and 6 visibly brighten the gate interior with #C8A84B or #F5A623 while preserving the 3 px stone frame thickness.
No text, arrow glyphs, or progress numerals appear inside the gate art.
